title: Russian Fermented Dumplings
description: A traditional Russian dish made with fermented fillings, wrapped in homemade dumpling dough.
instructions: Combine dumpling dough ingredients and knead for 10 minutes.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place 1 tablespoon of fermented cabbage mixture in the center of each circle.
Add a slice of Russian sausage on top of the cabbage.
Fold the dough over the filling and press edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of oil and swirl to coat the bottom.
Add the dumplings and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with crispy bacon bits on top.
